MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brett Vaughn, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Dev. Corp.
Michael Sherwood Rossoff representing the plaintiff.

Defendant John Dyal is present.
Grace Tong representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case settled, the trial date of 4/13/09 is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218)
